case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. DELORIS LOGAN et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK SERVED JAN-12-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOGAN, DELORIS
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE JUL-22-2010.

DECLARATION OF DELORIS LOGAN IN SUPPORT OF DEFT'S OPPOS. TO PLTF'S MTN FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LOGAN, DELORIS

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO THE AMOUNT OWED THROUGH HER DECLARATION THAT PLAINTIFF AGREED TO APPLY A LOWER INTEREST RATE. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
